scripts.test:smoke: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const apiDir=path.join(process.cwd(),'src','app','api'); const entries=fs.readdirSync(apiDir,{withFileTypes:true}).filter((entry)=>entry.isDirectory()); if(entries.length===0) throw new Error('No API route groups found'); console.log('dashboard smoke ok');"
